utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these sections. Each section is fully detailed: the property section includes address, type, price, size, fees, year built, amenities, and taxes; financing includes lender, amount, interest rate, term, amortization, and conditions; legal_services includes package, cost, and detailed scope; moving_services includes service name, cost, scope, and timeline; setup_services includes utilities and estimated cost; total_budget includes a full cost breakdown with all components and total. Therefore, all six items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution shows a purchase property at 180 Simcoe Street Unit 1207, Toronto, priced at CAD 475,000. This fits into the 'purchase_properties' category, and the closest match in the ground-truth list by price and description (modern condo within budget range) is 'New Build' at CAD 480K, rating 10. The financing solution uses Scotiabank with fixed rate, which best aligns with the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (rating 8), as it doesn’t mention the government first-time buyer scheme that defines the 'First-Time Buyer' option. The legal service is 'legal_basic_package_001' costing CAD 800, matching 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 9). The moving service named 'svc_premium_moving_180simcoe1207' costs CAD 1,200, corresponding clearly to 'Premium Moving' (rating 7). The utility setup cost is CAD 350, and among the utility options, the closest in both price range and scope (electricity, gas, water, internet) is 'Business Setup' at CAD 450 (rating 5) — other options are either lower (Basic) or premium but not matching the multi-utility scope.
